_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record placed at registry/assessments/<id>.json per the compression-census precedent. This assessment interprets a Tier-0 GATING census (bead kernel-of-truth-5iu; run 2026-07-10, $0, CPU-only, no model calls), NOT a frozen experiment: there is NO frozen SAP and NO verdict object; the K-A2 floor (<5% blended prefill savings at 10k concepts) is a STIPULATED sanity default 'reset at freeze' and no freeze happened, so no formal kill can FIRE and no formal go can be DECLARED. Every conclusion below is an INTERPRETIVE reading under docs/next/io-compression-signoff.md section 3 (N-IOC-S), ASM-0461 (input pins) and ASM-0462 (bracketing convention). Quarantine: MEASURED-exploratory throughout; nothing here enters any verdict chain.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern execution split: the runner (Opus role) executed the pinned census mechanically and asserted MEASURED numbers only (poc/a-e2/RUN-LOG.md explicitly reports, does not adjudicate); what the numbers MEAN, whether K-A2 clears, and whether the three flagged non-pinned sub-methods are lawful is decided here and only here. Scope = this file + registry/assumptions.jsonl appends (reserved block ASM-0560..0579); did not touch ideas.jsonl (idea-line appends are coordinator-central per N-IOC convention), audit-status, verdicts, or any frozen object.

summary.reproduce: cd poc/a-e2 && nice -n 15 python3 run-a-e2.py (inputs sha-pinned fail-closed in the summary manifest: wordfreq 3.1.1 large lists en/es/fi/ja; SmolLM2-135M-Instruct + Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct tokenizer.json at pinned revisions; a1-hybrid mapper policy e13dc838...; kernel-v0 manifest da56bf1f...)

en_mhat_decisions.note: per-surface isolated a1-hybrid decisions for all 321,180 English surfaces; decision-kind counts: none 319,896 / prime 876 / concept 244 / abstain 164

_surprise_note: No prereg claim / registered prior exists (pre-freeze gating census), so no surprise-* tag is licensed. The registered sizing expectation ASM-0464 (EXTRAPOLATION, load-bearing for nothing) is CONFIRMED IN DIRECTION on limb (a): value concentrates in non-English high-fertility cells and English sits near the floor - now MEASURED on our pinned tokenizers, superseding the memory-tagged literature note. Limb (b) (material m-hat discount) is NOT resolved either way: the measured m-hat delta is tiny only because the estimator is a near-no-op upper bound (see flag-1 ratification), not because mappability risk is small.

interpretation.headline: A-E2 establishes, as a MEASURED-exploratory membership UPPER BOUND, that idea A's selection-stage value pool is real and large: at the 10k-concept K-A2 anchor the blended prefill-savings bound spans ~4.8% (harshest lawful cell: Qwen2.5 tokenizer, English-dominant usage-share weights, wordlike universe, m-hat, lower bracket) to ~43.6% (SmolLM2, uniform weights, all-surfaces, upper bracket); under the sub-methods ratified below the decision-facing headline is blended uniform wordlike membership @10k = 33.4-41.7% (SmolLM2, lower/upper bracket) and 18.5-24.0% (Qwen2.5). The value is fertility-asymmetry-driven and concentrates overwhelmingly in non-English cells (fi @10k 38.7-44.3%, ja 18.0-56.7% across tokenizers, wordlike); English alone is near the floor (mean BPE/word ~1.15, en @10k wordlike 3.9-5.9%). K-A2 does NOT fire anywhere on the grid (interpretive: minimum upper bracket @10k = 7.06% >= the 5% STIPULATED floor, and K-A2 may fire only off the upper bracket per ASM-0462). This is a stark, like-for-like-tier contrast with the parked idea B (~0.4% word-mass savings, ~5x BELOW its floor, at the same census tier): idea A is ALIVE at the selection stage, and the first efficiency-thesis breadth number of this magnitude in the programme. It is ONLY a membership upper bound: mappability (K-A4) is unpriced in every cell, the consumption channel (K-A3 tokenizer-extension null, trained-compressor null, 1-token-per-concept delivery, accuracy non-inferiority) is entirely unmeasured, and the bound must never be quoted as achievable savings.

k_a2_gate_read.floor: K-A2 sanity default = blended prefill savings < 5% at 10k concepts (STIPULATED, reset at freeze; ASM-0463 context). No freeze exists, so this is an interpretive read, not a fired/cleared verdict.
k_a2_gate_read.read: DOES NOT FIRE. Per ASM-0462 the kill may fire only off the UPPER bracket; the minimum upper bracket @10k across the full 16-cell grid (2 tokenizers x 2 weight arms x 2 m-hat modes x 2 surface filters) is 7.06% (Qwen2.5 | usage-share | m-hat | wordlike), i.e. every cell's kill-side number clears the floor. Most of the decision-facing grid clears it by 3-8x (uniform wordlike upper brackets: SmolLM2 41.7%, Qwen 24.0%).
k_a2_gate_read.harshest_cell: Qwen2.5 | usage-share | m-hat | wordlike @10k = 4.79% lower / 7.06% upper. The 5% floor falls BETWEEN the brackets in this one cell: it can neither fire the kill (upper >= floor) nor support a go (lower < floor). Per ASM-0462's between-brackets clause this conditionally forces A-F1 (cross-lingual alignment) design BEFORE any mint decision - binding if and only if the freeze-time consumption currency is a high-CJK-coverage Qwen-like tokenizer AND the ratified workload mix is English-dominant. It does not block A-F0 (ASM-0463: A-F0 survives even a K-A2 fire).
k_a2_gate_read.go_side: A go may rest only on the LOWER bracket (ASM-0462). Lower brackets @10k clear the floor in 15 of 16 cells (all uniform cells 18.4-35.3%; SmolLM2 usage-share cells 14.0-18.1%; Qwen usage-share all-filter 9.1-9.6%; Qwen usage-share wordlike membership 5.29%); only the harshest cell (4.79%) sits under. Interpretive conclusion: the census supports proceeding down the ladder, and no cell licenses a kill.

licenses: [MEASURED-exploratory] Selection-stage value pool: on the ASM-0461-pinned inputs, minting 10k concepts by the value(c) objective bounds blended prefill savings at 33.4-41.7% (SmolLM2, uniform, wordlike, membership, lower/upper bracket) and 18.5-24.0% (Qwen2.5, same cell) - one to two orders of magnitude above the parked idea B's measured ~0.4% at the same census tier. Scope: membership upper bound, these two tokenizers, these four wordfreq lists, listed-word running text (~99% of list mass; unlisted tail excluded from numerator AND denominator).

[MEASURED-exploratory] Fertility asymmetry is real on OUR pinned tokenizers (no longer a memory-tagged literature claim): mean BPE/word en 1.16/1.15 (SmolLM2/Qwen), es 1.85/1.41, fi 3.15/2.68, ja 3.06/1.34; per-language @10k membership (all-filter) en 10.6%/9.3%, es 37.0%/20.4%, fi 46.3%/41.0%, ja 57.5%/19.7%. English contributes near-floor value by construction (most high-frequency English words are already 1 token). This resolves ASM-0464 limb (a) in direction, superseding the unverified literature note for these tokenizers.

[MEASURED-exploratory] Strong tokenizer dependence: SmolLM2 tokenizes Japanese ~2.3x more expensively than Qwen2.5 (ja mean BPE/word 3.06 vs 1.34; ja @10k 57.5% vs 19.7%), because Qwen's vocabulary has far more CJK coverage. The consumption currency (which host tokenizer denominates savings; ASM-0103 / A-E3) is therefore load-bearing for any freeze-time margin on this track.

[MEASURED-exploratory] Strong weight dependence: the English-dominant usage-share arm roughly halves the blended curve vs uniform (SmolLM2 membership all @10k: 35.3/43.6% -> 18.1/21.9%). The workload mix is a load-bearing free parameter; both arms must be reported until a maintainer-ratified mix exists (ASM-0561).

[MEASURED-exploratory] Curve shape: value is front-loaded but not saturated at the anchor - e.g. SmolLM2 uniform wordlike upper bracket rises 24.4% @1k -> 32.6% @3k -> 41.7% @10k -> 47.4% @25k -> 54.6% at full-list; the 10k anchor captures roughly three-quarters of the full-list bound. Mint-budget economics (A-F0/A-E1) have a real curve to optimise against.

[MEASURED] English isolated-surface mappability discount is a near-no-op: the a1-hybrid mapper abstains on 164 of 321,180 English surfaces (0.05%); m-hat weighting moves en @10k by ~0.6pp (10.65->10.01 all; 5.90->5.28 wordlike, SmolLM2). This measures only intrinsic-surface collisions against the current 119-entry lexicon; it does NOT measure context-dependent polysemy (see flag-1 ratification and does_not_license).

[MEASURED-exploratory] Idea A vs idea B contrast (efficiency-thesis breadth): the same census methodology that parked idea B (~0.4% savings, ~5x below its 2% floor, no internal rescue lever) yields idea A a minimum-cell bound of ~4.8-7.1% and a central band of ~18-44% @10k. The differentiation ruled in ASM-0460 (new-coverage minting, per-span disjunctive engagement, cross-lingual fertility axis) is now backed by a measured value gap, not just a structural argument: idea A is ALIVE.
does_not_license: [UPPER-BOUND, both m-hat modes] Every number in this census is a MEMBERSHIP-family upper bound on selection value. Non-English cells run m-hat=1 by construction (disclosed per cell): K-A4 (mappability collapse under polysemy) is unpriced there. The English m-hat cells do NOT price it either - the isolated-surface estimator is itself an upper bound (only intrinsic collisions visible; RUN-LOG flag 1). A real mappability discount is unmeasured in ALL cells and could pull the harshest cells to or below the K-A2 floor (ASM-0564, direction-only, load-bearing for nothing). No number here may be quoted as mappability-priced.

[NOT ACHIEVABLE SAVINGS] The bound assumes every minted concept is delivered in exactly 1 token, losslessly consumed, with zero accuracy cost. The entire consumption channel is unmeasured: the K-A3 tokenizer-vocabulary-extension null (just extend the tokenizer, no kernel needed) and the trained-compressor null are LIVE downstream kills that census cannot settle (ASM-0460); accuracy non-inferiority is an F3-stage co-primary. Quoting these percentages as deliverable efficiency gains is an overclaim.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] Scope is these 4 languages, these 2 tokenizers, wordfreq-3.1.1 large lists, and listed-word running text. The blended numbers extrapolate to no other workload, tokenizer, or language mix; the usage-share arm is STIPULATED-exploratory, not a measured mix (ASM-0561); renormalising the raw web-share inputs over only 4 languages concentrates 0.832 weight on English and omits the ~1/3 of web content in other (mostly non-English, fertility-bearing) languages - a full mix would likely land between the two arms, but that is unmeasured.

[WORD-LEVEL ONLY] Despite the idea's name, the census is word-surface-level (wordfreq lists carry single surfaces): multi-word phrase value is unmeasured in either direction, and per-language curves are unaligned (concept identity across languages deferred to A-F1 under the ASM-0462 brackets). The brackets are exact for the additive objective but say nothing about alignment feasibility or cost.

[NO FORMAL GATE EVENT] Nothing is frozen: K-A2 'does not fire' is an interpretive read against a STIPULATED sanity default that resets at freeze. It licenses continuing the pre-authorized ladder (A-F0), not any Tier-1+ spend, mint decision, or verdict claim.

[DENOMINATOR CONVENTION] Savings fractions are relative to listed-word prefill mass (~99% of list-covered running text); the unlisted tail is excluded from numerator and denominator. Real-corpus prefill contains punctuation, code, markup, and unlisted surfaces, so the same concept set on a real corpus denominates lower; direction known, magnitude unmeasured (A-E3 territory).

sub_method_ratifications._context: Three sub-methods were flagged by the runner as not byte-pinned by ASM-0461 (RUN-LOG 'Flagged decisions'). Ratification authority: this is the design/interpretation lane the RUN-LOG names. Each ruling is registered as a STIPULATED assumption in the reserved block.

flag_1_english_mhat_estimator.ruling: RATIFIED-WITH-RECLASSIFICATION (ASM-0560). The isolated-surface a1-hybrid decision (m-hat=0 iff abstain) is the lawful reading of ASM-0461's 'sampled with the English-only a1-hybrid mapper' for THIS run: the in-context (M0a-style) alternative was unlawful at $0 because the on-box TinyStories copy is not byte-identical to the pinned corpus (fail-closed provenance forbids substituting it), and isolated-surface is deterministic, pinned (policy e13dc838..., kernel manifest da56bf1f...), and fully disclosed. RECLASSIFICATION: the m-hat cells are a SECOND UPPER BOUND, near-coincident with membership (abstain 164/321,180), NOT a K-A4 pricing. The ASM-0460 requirement that m-hat-weighted cells 'price K-A4 up front' is discharged in letter only; K-A4 remains unpriced in every cell and a real pricing instrument is required before any A-E1 mint-selection freeze (questions_opened).
flag_1_english_mhat_estimator.alters_the_read: No for the K-A2 gate (both m-hat modes clear the floor on the upper bracket everywhere); Yes for the epistemic frame (all 16 cells are upper bounds; no mappability-priced number exists).

flag_2_usage_share_weights.ruling: RATIFIED-AS-SENSITIVITY-ENDPOINT-ONLY (ASM-0561). The illustrative English-dominant vector (raw en 0.520 / es 0.055 / ja 0.045 / fi 0.005, renormalised to en 0.832 over the 4 census languages) is accepted as the harsh endpoint of the unmeasured workload-mix axis: renormalisation over 4 languages pushes weight toward English (the near-zero-value cell), so the arm is conservative-harsh for idea A, which is the correct direction for a sensitivity floor. It is STIPULATED-exploratory, NOT a measurement, and is NOT ratified as a workload mix: no gate, verdict, or spend decision may rest on either weight arm alone; the uniform-vs-usage-share span must be carried whole until the maintainer ratifies a mix at freeze (workload-mix discipline).
flag_2_usage_share_weights.alters_the_read: No change to the gate (harshest usage-share upper bracket 7.06% still clears); it defines the honest lower edge of the reported span.

flag_3_wordlike_filter.ruling: RATIFIED-AND-ADOPTED as the decision-relevant mint-candidate universe (ASM-0562). Digit-bearing/degenerate surfaces ('0000', '00,000') are not mintable concepts under the programme's concept notion - minting them is out of idea A's mechanism scope, and their BPE expense is a frequency-list construction artifact, not harvestable concept value. The filter is numerator-only (denominator stays over all surfaces), i.e. strictly conservative. Gate reads and headline quotes MUST use wordlike cells; 'all' cells are retained as disclosure of the artifact's size (it halves English: en @10k 10.65->5.90 SmolLM2; blended effect ~2pp uniform, up to ~4pp usage-share).
flag_3_wordlike_filter.alters_the_read: Yes, materially and honestly downward: the ratified headline is 33.4-41.7% (SmolLM2 uniform) / 18.5-24.0% (Qwen uniform) instead of 35.3-43.6% / 21.1-26.7%, and the harshest cell moves onto the floor (4.79% lower bracket). Direction of every conclusion unchanged; the gate still does not fire.

epistemic_promotions.claim: cross-lingual BPE fertility asymmetry (non-English words cost multiple tokens where English is ~1) on the programme's pinned host tokenizers
epistemic_promotions.from: EXTRAPOLATION (ASM-0464 limb a; memory-tagged literature note, unverified)
epistemic_promotions.scope: SmolLM2-135M + Qwen2.5-0.5B tokenizers, wordfreq-3.1.1 en/es/fi/ja lists

epistemic_promotions.claim: idea A's selection-stage value pool clears the K-A2 sanity floor with margin on the kill-side bracket in every lawful cell
epistemic_promotions.to: MEASURED-exploratory (membership upper bound; interpretive, no freeze)

epistemic_promotions.claim: mappability-priced (K-A4) value, achievable consumption savings, accuracy impact, phrase-level value, aligned cross-lingual value

forks_resolved.resolution: DOES-NOT-FIRE (interpretive; nothing frozen): minimum upper bracket @10k = 7.06% >= 5% floor; kill-side clearance 1.4x (harshest cell) to 8.7x (SmolLM2 uniform). One cell straddles the floor between brackets -> ASM-0462's A-F1-before-mint clause is conditionally armed (Qwen-like currency + English-dominant mix).
RATIFIED-WITH-RECLASSIFICATION per ASM-0560: lawful for this run; all cells remain upper bounds; K-A4 unpriced everywhere; real pricing instrument required before A-E1 selection freeze.
RATIFIED-AS-SENSITIVITY-ENDPOINT per ASM-0561: harsh endpoint of the workload-mix axis; span reporting mandatory; mix ratification is a maintainer freeze-time act.
RATIFIED-AND-ADOPTED per ASM-0562: wordlike is the decision-relevant universe (numerator-only, conservative); 'all' is disclosure-only. Headline restated accordingly.

forks_resolved.fork: next rung on the ASM-0463 ladder
forks_resolved.resolution: PROCEED TO A-F0 (cached-prefix mint economics, ~$5-10, already maintainer-cleared, runs only AFTER this readout - condition now met). A-E1 remains gated on {A-F0 verdict, live selection target, maintainer spend-ack}; the live-selection-target condition is satisfiable today by the uniform-arm/non-English cells, but A-E1 design must resolve the K-A4 pricing stub and specify its target in the wordlike universe.

questions_opened.question: Design and run a real K-A4 mappability pricing before any A-E1 mint-selection freeze: in-context m-hat sampling on a provenance-pinned corpus (the M0a-pinned bytes or a newly pinned equivalent), or a polysemy-stratified discount over the value ranking, for at least English + one high-fertility language. The isolated-surface estimator (164/321,180 abstains) cannot see context-dependent polysemy and leaves every census cell an upper bound.

Maintainer ratification of the workload-mix weight vector at freeze (workload-mix discipline): uniform and the illustrative English-dominant arm differ by ~2x blended; neither is a measurement. Until ratified, all quotes must carry the span.
blocking: any freeze-time margin on the compression track

questions_opened.question: Resolve the consumption currency (ASM-0103 / A-E3, behind F3 gates): tokenizer dependence is ~2-3x on the CJK axis (SmolLM2 vs Qwen ja), so which tokenizer denominates freeze-time savings is load-bearing. Dual-use with the parked idea B's host-BPE re-denomination re-entry census.

Negative-completion sizing (not a gate): re-denominate a chosen concept set against real running-text prefill (punctuation/code/markup/unlisted mass included) to size the listed-word-denominator optimism. Direction known (down), magnitude unmeasured.

ASM-0462 between-brackets clause is conditionally armed by the harshest cell (4.79/7.06 straddling the 5% floor): if the freeze-time currency is a Qwen-like high-CJK-coverage tokenizer AND the ratified mix is English-dominant, A-F1 (cross-lingual alignment) must be designed before any mint decision. Not blocking A-F0.
blocking: mint decision under the named conditions

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED dry-plan estimates, never measurements. Nothing here authorizes spend; A-F0's ~$5-10 is already inside the maintainer's standing clearance per ASM-0463 and needs no new authorization.

ledger_updates.statement: A-E2 census: idea A's selection-stage value pool is MEASURED (membership upper bound) at blended @10k = 33.4-41.7% (SmolLM2 | uniform | wordlike, lower/upper bracket) and 18.5-24.0% (Qwen2.5 | uniform | wordlike); grid span 4.79-43.6% across weight arms, filters, m-hat modes and brackets. K-A2 interpretively does NOT fire: minimum upper bracket 7.06% >= the 5% STIPULATED floor.
ledger_updates.scope: MEASURED-exploratory; wordfreq-3.1.1 en/es/fi/ja; SmolLM2-135M + Qwen2.5-0.5B tokenizers; listed-word denominator; upper bound only (K-A4 unpriced, consumption unmeasured)

ledger_updates.statement: Fertility asymmetry measured on pinned tokenizers: mean BPE/word en 1.15-1.16, es 1.41-1.85, fi 2.68-3.15, ja 1.34-3.06; value concentrates in non-English cells; English near floor (en @10k wordlike 3.9-5.9%). Tokenizer dependence ~2-3x on the CJK axis; weight-arm dependence ~2x.

Sub-method rulings: isolated-surface a1-hybrid m-hat ratified-with-reclassification (all cells upper bounds; K-A4 unpriced everywhere); usage-share weights ratified as harsh sensitivity endpoint only; wordlike ratified-and-adopted as the decision-relevant mint-candidate universe.
One cell (Qwen2.5 | usage-share | m-hat | wordlike @10k: 4.79 lower / 7.06 upper) straddles the K-A2 floor between the ASM-0462 brackets, conditionally arming the A-F1-before-mint clause.
ledger_updates.scope: same envelope; conditional on freeze-time currency + mix

assumptions_registered.summary: flag-1 ruling: isolated-surface a1-hybrid m-hat lawful for this run; reclassified as second upper bound; K-A4 pricing instrument required before A-E1 selection freeze
flag-2 ruling: usage-share vector = STIPULATED-exploratory harsh sensitivity endpoint only; span reporting mandatory; mix ratification is maintainer freeze-time act
flag-3 ruling: wordlike = decision-relevant mint-candidate universe (conservative, numerator-only); 'all' disclosure-only

K-A2 interpretive gate status: does not fire (min upper bracket 7.06% @10k); harshest-cell between-brackets straddle conditionally arms ASM-0462's A-F1-before-mint clause; ladder proceeds to A-F0 per ASM-0463

EXTRAPOLATION (load-bearing for nothing): a real K-A4 pricing is expected to discount the band materially, direction from B-E0's covered-English mappability evidence; magnitude unknown; resolution = the pricing instrument stub

assumptions_resolved.outcome: resolved-measured (direction confirmed on pinned tokenizers; register line stays open append-only - this note is the supersession record its resolution_path names)
still-open (estimator near-no-op by construction; superseded in expectation-carrying role by ASM-0564)
honoured-as-executed (fail-closed provenance verified in the committed manifest; three non-pinned sub-methods flagged by the runner and ratified here)
honoured-as-executed (kill read off upper brackets only, go read off lower brackets only; between-brackets clause armed for exactly one cell)

boundary_stops.item: Workload-mix ratification (which weight vector denominates freeze-time margins)
boundary_stops.reason: A measurement-free design choice with ~2x leverage on the headline; the workload-mix discipline reserves it to the maintainer at freeze. This assessment carries the span instead.

boundary_stops.item: A-E1 spend (~$20-40) and any mint decision
boundary_stops.reason: ASM-0463 gates A-E1 on {A-F0 verdict, live selection target, maintainer spend-ack}; this assessment supplies the live-selection-target reading but cannot supply the spend-ack, and the K-A4 pricing stub plus (conditionally) A-F1 design must precede a selection freeze.

boundary_stops.item: registry/ideas.jsonl status append for idea A (alive-selection-stage, next rung A-F0)
boundary_stops.reason: Idea-line appends are coordinator-central per the N-IOC convention; not performed here.

tree_impact: crosslingual-phrase-coverage (idea A) mini-tree: A-E2 rung COMPLETE and POSITIVE at the membership-upper-bound tier - mechanism_state = alive-selection-stage; K-A2 interpretively clear everywhere on the kill-side bracket; next rung = A-F0 (mint economics, ~$5-10, pre-cleared, condition 'after the A-E2 readout' now satisfied); A-E1 stays gated (ASM-0463) and additionally acquires the K-A4-pricing prerequisite (ASM-0560) and the conditional A-F1 prerequisite (ASM-0563). The A-E3/consumption-currency question is promoted from housekeeping to load-bearing by the measured 2-3x tokenizer dependence. Idea B (parked, ASM-0460): unchanged - but A-E2's fi/ja fertility measurements strengthen the case that coverage growth (B's re-entry lever) is best bought cross-lingually. Efficiency-thesis breadth: this is the programme's first measured multi-tens-of-percent efficiency bound on any input-compression mechanism; it is an upper bound and must be consumed as such. Nothing frozen, nothing spent, no verdict object created; census remains quarantined MEASURED-exploratory.
